description: Capability for the setup-wizard window (electron/setup-wizard/**). Grants core IPC (invoke) so the window can call the app-local `complete_setup` command. Per-command trust is enforced in-command by window label (windows::is_allowed_window) — the Rust analog of the Electron webContents-id `isAllowedSender` gate (entry.ts:513) — since app-defined commands are not permission-gated in Tauri v2.
